calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Erin Scharg, Esq. (916) 438-1819()EASON & TAMBORNINI, A LAW CORPORATION for Petitioner.
Jose Martinez, Payee.

RULING - ARGUED. Hearing is held. Mr. Martinez informs the Court his plans for the settlement. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER OSWALD BELMAN, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights.

Granted. The Court approves the request. Ms. Scharg to submit a proposed form of order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
